message: Node started: Verify if k=1 is possible (is 2023 a power of 2?), if k=2 is possible (is 2^a + 2^b divisible by 2023?), and if k=3 is possible (is 2^a + 2^b + 2^c divisible by 2023?). Specifically, check the order of 2 modulo 2023 and use the properties of the divisors of 2023 (7, 17, 17) to test small values of k.
